25/06/2025, 23:32 Electronic funds transfer instruction (EFTI) | AUSTRAC

Australian Government
~ AUSTRAC

Electronic funds transfer
instruction (EFTI)

Home / Electronic funds transfer instruction (EFTI)

An instruction for the transfer of money controlled by a customer to another person,
where:

e the transfer instruction is carried out or passed on electronically

e the transfer is within the same financial institution or between financial institutions.

See

AML/CTF Act 2006 sections 5, 8 and 9

https://www.austrac.gov.au/glossary/electronic-funds-transfer-instruction-efti

1/1
